title: salvia verticillata subsp. verticillata
intro: Salvia verticillata subsp. verticillata, also known as clustered blue sage, is a perennial plant species in the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its blue or purple flowers and distinctive whorled leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Salvia verticillata subsp. verticillata include reducing inflammation, relieving stress and anxiety, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve mental clarity.
